catalog_content:
Item Name: TOSS Crushed Red Pepper Flakes, Red Chili Flakes Bulk Spice 4 LB Container, Hot Pepper Flakes For Pizza Seasoning, Great for Chowder, Seafood, Pasta Seasonings and Spices for Cooking
Bullet Point 1: 🌶️ Spice Up Your Dish! - Enhance your favorite dishes with a kick of heat and flavor that is sure to satisfy any craving. Whether you're spicing up a side or adding some zip to the main course, this feature is a great addition to any meal.
Bullet Point 2: 🌶️Delicious Flavor Boost - You'll love how a sprinkle of crushed red chili pepper flakes enhances the flavor of soups, stews, salads, and more. It's a great way to elevate your dishes and add a hint of warmth and spice.
Bullet Point 3: 🌶️Extra Spice - Add a tasty kick to your snacks and appetizers with a sprinkle of crushed red chili pepper flakes. With just a pinch, your otherwise ordinary dishes now have a vibrant flavor that can be enjoyed by all.
Bullet Point 4: 🌶️BULK Enjoy the convenience of a 4 pound bulk size for foodservice and professional use - great for stocking up for larger scale meals or for frequent use in the kitchen. Great for the chef or restaurant that needs a larger quantity of crushed red chili pepper flakes.
Bullet Point 5: 🌶️ KOSHER Certified kosher by KW Kosher
Product Description: Crushed chilli or red pepper flakes is a condiment consisting of dried and crushed red chili peppers. Use crushed red pepper to add a little heat to your scrambled eggs, creamy pasta, hearty salad, or savory soup. This spice has even become a commonly used accompaniment to parmesan cheese on sliced pizza. Crushed red pepper doesn't only taste good; it's also good for you. Red peppers are full of antioxidants, may boost immune system health, and may reduce blood cholesterol. Capsaicin, the compound that gives red pepper its heat, may also help support weight loss. Spice up your next meal with a little sprinkle of TOSS Crushed red pepper
Value: 64.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Bulk spice product with a focus on affordability and quantity. The large 4 lb container suggests a cost-effective option for frequent use or foodservice. Plastic packaging and absence of premium claims indicate a mid-range price point. Kosher certification adds value for specific consumer segments.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Bachan's - Japanese Dipping Sauce - Sweet & Spicy, 16 Oz, Small Batch, Non GMO, No Preservatives, No Nut, No Dairy, Vegan and BPA free. Dipping Sauce for Wings, Chicken, Steak, Appetizers and more
Bullet Point 1: 🐙 FLAVOR: Bachan’s Japanese Dipping Sauce is unlike any other dipping sauce you’ve tasted, an entirely original way to dip. Our new sauces are thick, sweet, & savory, featuring authentic Japanese ingredients like stone-ground sesame (neri goma), white miso, and the bold, fresh flavors you love from Bachan’s. Sweet & Spicy features Red Habanero - this chili pepper hits with a slow-burn kind of heat. It’s not so hot that your tongue feels like it’s on fire, but it’s hot enough to deliver just the right amount of flavorful kick. Our Japanese Dipping Sauce is great for dipping proteins, appetizers, veggies or you can use it as a spread or dressing.
Bullet Point 2: ❤️ OUR INGREDIENTS MATTER: Cane Sugar, Sesame Paste, Non-GMO Soy Sauce (Water, Soybeans, Wheat, Salt), Organic Rice Vinegar, White Miso (Rice, Filtered Water, Non-GMO Soybeans, Sea Salt), Red Habanero Puree (Red Habanero Peppers, Salt, Vinegar), Crushed Sesame Seeds, Organic Toasted Sesame Oil, Organic Ginger, Mirin (Water, Rice, Koji Seed, Sea Salt), Organic Garlic, Tomato Paste, Sea Salt.
Bullet Point 3: 🥶 COLD-FILLED: To stay true to the original recipe, we cold-fill our sauce—which eliminates any need for additives, preservatives, or flavorings. Our crave-worthy flavor comes naturally from delicious, clean ingredients.
Bullet Point 4: 📦 SMALL BATCH: ​​Every time we make Bachan’s Japanese Barbecue Sauce it is produced in small batches, so that you only get the freshest of the fresh! Every batch is tasted at the kettle and approved by the Bachan’s Fam before it goes out.
Bullet Point 5: 🚫 PRESERVATIVE-FREE: We formulated our sauce to be shelf stable without the use of preservatives. We also don’t add any water to our sauce.
Product Description: Double-dipping is only permitted in the company of family, and Bachan’s brings families together. That means all bets are off with our Sweet & Spicy Japanese Dipping Sauce. You get rich, dippable creaminess from stone-ground sesame. Then bold, savory flavor from non-GMO soy sauce and miso. And finally, a slow build of red habanero heat. It’s hot, but not hot enough to overtake the flavor. Or to keep eager dippers from diving back in with their chicken, spring rolls, apps or veggies. At Bachan’s, we keep our promise to keep it real. Our crave-worthy flavor always comes from simple, clean ingredients. And we cold-fill every bottle to eliminate the need for preservatives, additives or flavorings. Now let’s eat! Itadakimasu!
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium dipping sauce with bold, authentic Japanese flavors and a sweet-spicy profile. Small-batch production, cold-filled without preservatives, and made with organic and non-GMO ingredients. Positioned as a high-quality, artisanal condiment for gourmet or specialty food applications.
